source: Sensor Tower, GIGAZINE, Hotel News Resource, fashionunited.uk, MediaPost

scenes.headline: **2026 Generative AI App Boom**
scenes.vo: Welcome to 'Doubling Down: Unpacking the 2026 Generative AI App Boom & Future Projections'. Get ready to dive into the explosive growth of Generative AI.

scenes.label: Projected Global Time Spent on Generative AI Apps (H1 2026)
scenes.vo: A staggering **36 Billion Hours** will be spent on Generative AI apps in the first half of 2026, more than doubling from 17.2 Billion in 2025.

scenes.heading: Key Highlights from Sensor Tower’s Report

items.title: ChatGPT Reaches 1 Billion Monthly Active Users
ChatGPT’s Market Share Slips Below 50% for First Time
Snap Spins Off Gen-AI Video Team into New Company, Dotmo

scenes.vo: Sensor Tower’s State of AI 2026 Report highlights key trends: surging engagement, shifting market shares, and record consumer spending on A-I apps.

scenes.heading: Driving Factors
scenes.vo: Driving this boom are integration with existing services, specialized expertise, competitive pricing, and enhanced processing speed of A-I solutions.
'**AI is an execution tool**' - as the market matures, users prioritize functionality and seamless experiences over novelty, creating space for new players.

scenes.label: Projected Consumer Spending on AI Apps (Record High in 2026)
scenes.vo: **$1.1 Billion+** in projected monthly active users for ChatGPT by May 2026, despite a shifting market landscape.

scenes.title: Generative AI Market Share Shifts
scenes.vo: Market Share Shifts: ChatGPT below 50% for the first time (46.4%), with Gemini rising to 27.7% and Claude to 10.3%, signaling a competitive A-I market.

scenes.heading: Future Projections by 2030
scenes.vo: By **2030**, projections indicate a further entrenchment of A-I in daily life, with anticipated innovations in I-P-O strategies for AI-centric startups.

scenes.headline: **The Inference** on Generative AI’s Explosive Growth
scenes.vo: **The Inference**: The 2026 Generative AI App Boom is just the beginning. Stay ahead of the curve as A-I continues to redefine the tech landscape.
